title: Expert-Build
description:
Thanks to several features and shortcuts, simplify and build faster!
This plugin will allow you to save time, but above all to be more flexible in your creations.
body: # Expert-Build The **expert-build** plugin is available for free. The project aims to improve the performance of builders with different easy-to-use tools. The project is run on a voluntary basis with the aim of improving it by listening to user feedback and ideas, so don't hesitate to share your good ideas 🌱 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ## what is this plugin ⁉️ Different brush commands and brushes will allow you to improve your abilities, such as: - the deconstructor to make timelapses - or the brush that tilts your clipboard according to your vision - the selection on the fly - terraforming brushes - random clipboards brush integrating auto rotate \ ... \ and many other possibilities **And in addition all the commands are compatible with fawe, isn't that great ?** The plugin is accessible from beginner level, \ its objective is to continue to develop, with feedback from builders who want to see new features arrive **The plugin is developed by a builder, and tested by builders to allow having a tool that corresponds as much as possible to the need** ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ## 📥 Download > > [Latest version](https://modrinth.com/plugin/expert-build) > > ## Discord > > [Join discord](https://discord.gg/R2q8HuzSmM) > > ## 🔗 General info > > Depend : FAWE \ > Compatibility : PlotSquared > > > > > Supported_Versions : > > > > 1.18.x / 1.19.x / 1.20.x / 1.21.x > >
